reviewer: direct-review (subagent spawn failed due to bun-eval parsing)
summary: Supabase types were properly regenerated to include skills and agent_skills tables. The temporary fromTable() untyped workaround was fully removed from both useSkills.ts and SkillSelection.tsx. All table access is now type-safe via supabase.from() with generated table names. Skill and AgentSkill types were upgraded from manual interfaces to Tables<> from generated types. Nullable field access for description and category was properly handled with nullish coalescing.

nonBlocking.description: The import of Tables and Json from types.ts could be combined into a single import statement for cleanliness: `import type { Tables, Json } from '@/integrations/supabase/types';`

codeQuality.typeSafety: All fromTable() workarounds removed. Skills CRUD, assignment, and schema-readiness checks all use typed supabase.from() calls.
codeQuality.conventions: Follows existing codebase patterns with React Query hooks and company-scoped access.
codeQuality.testCoverage: Existing skills-registry test suite (34 tests) passes with the type-safe changes.
